overview: Simic Landfall leverages the landfall mechanic to accelerate resource generation and grow threats rapidly. By playing multiple lands per turn and cycling through Earthbender Ascension, the deck triggers landfall repeatedly to buff Badgermole Cub and Mightform Harmonizer. This approach aims to outpace opponents through consistent board presence and incremental value generation.
win_conditions: Trigger landfall repeatedly to grow Badgermole Cub and Mightform Harmonizer into unblockable threats
Use Earthbender Ascension to accelerate land drops and trigger landfall on turn 3-4
Outvalue opponents through continuous landfall triggers and board presence

keep_criteria: Hands with at least two lands and a landfall-triggering creature
Hands containing Earthbender Ascension with early land drops
Hands with multiple low-cost creatures that benefit from landfall
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking lands or landfall synergy
Hands with only high-cost cards and no ramp
Hands with multiple removal spells but no threats

early_game: Prioritize playing lands to trigger landfall before casting creatures
Establish early board presence with Badgermole Cub
Hold up mana for potential Earthbender Ascension plays
mid_game: Play multiple lands per turn to maximize landfall triggers
Use Earthbender Ascension to fetch lands and trigger landfall repeatedly
Grow Mightform Harmonizer and other threats to control the board
late_game: Maintain landfall triggers every turn to keep threats growing
Use excess mana to play lands and trigger landfall even when ahead
Close out games with large, unblockable creatures and board presence

key_cards.name: Badgermole Cub
key_cards.notes: Play on turns when lands enter to trigger growth or value; keep it safe until it becomes a significant threat.

key_cards.name: Earthbender Ascension
key_cards.notes: Use to play extra lands or search for lands, ensuring landfall triggers on the same turn; hold up mana if needed for counterspells.

key_cards.name: Mightform Harmonizer
key_cards.notes: Synergizes with landfall to grow or buff other creatures; prioritize keeping it alive to maximize cumulative triggers.

sequencing_tips: Always play lands before casting creatures to ensure landfall triggers on the same turn
Hold up mana for Earthbender Ascension when you suspect opponent interaction
Prioritize landfall triggers over combat damage when you are ahead in board state
Sequence removal to protect key landfall beneficiaries before they are fully grown

matchups.advice: Prioritize early land drops and landfall triggers to grow threats quickly; use Earthbender Ascension to accelerate past their early pressure.
Play around counterspells by holding up mana; use landfall triggers to generate value even when spells are countered.
Race with landfall triggers while using removal to clear their threats; maintain board presence to outvalue them.

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Archetype name and signature cards indicate landfall synergy and ramp focus.

win_conditions_evidence.evidence_span: Derived from landfall mechanic and signature card interactions.

sequencing_tips_evidence.evidence_span: Standard landfall deck sequencing principles applied to signature cards.

common_threats_evidence.evidence_span: Standard format meta threats that interact with ramp/landfall strategies.
